label: Observed inheritance effects
description: Whether inversion carriers transmit marker haplotypes differently than non-carriers.

preconditions.rationale: parent-offspring meioses needed to score transmission

limitations: cannot resolve sex-specific rates without parent_sex_known
no formal SE on small dyad counts (n<30)

label: Exact crossover positions per dyad
description: Localising each crossover to a marker interval per parent-offspring meiosis.

preconditions.rationale: dyads are the unit of meiosis
per-chromosome event counts are the canonical output

label: NCO vs CO separation
description: Distinguishing non-crossover (gene-conversion-like) tracts from full crossovers.

preconditions.rationale: phased offspring transmissions are needed to call short non-crossover tracts

label: Sex-specific meiotic recombination rates
description: Compare recombination rates separately by parental sex.

preconditions.rationale: without parent sex this is not separable
